description_long: This object is a rustic, cylindrical wooden bucket with a dark, weathered surface, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements. The bucket features a thick, integrated side handle, carved from the same material as the main body, providing a sturdy grip. The rim is uneven and slightly irregular, adding to its hand-crafted appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a matte, rough finish and no visible paint or decorative markings. The base is slightly wider and reinforced, likely to provide stability when placed on the ground. The interior appears hollow and deep, suitable for carrying or storing liquids or small items.
description: A weathered, cylindrical wooden bucket with a thick integrated handle and a rough, rustic finish.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from a slight angle, showing its cylindrical body and the open, uneven rim, with the handle just out of view.
description_view_1: This view highlights the thick, integrated side handle, which is carved from the same wood as the bucket body.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible, showing its solid, rectangular form and the hollow space for gripping.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bucket is shown, with the handle mostly hidden and the rough wood texture prominent.
